Package net.minheur.potoflux.translations

Class AbstractTranslationsRegistry

java.lang.Object
net.minheur.potoflux.translations.AbstractTranslationsRegistry
Direct Known Subclasses:
CommonTranslations, FileTranslations, PotoFluxTranslations
public abstract class AbstractTranslationsRegistry extends Object
Abstract registry for a lang

      Creates a AbstractTranslationsRegistry.TranslationBuilder with a main key and children (separated by a .)

      mainKey - the main key of the translation
      children - all other keys to add
